---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new feature for DeadChest
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Problem Statement

Describe the problem, limitation, or use case behind this request.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the behavior or feature you would like to see.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions, workarounds, or related ideas you have considered.

## Use Case

Explain who would benefit from this feature and in what situation.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, examples, screenshots, or links here.

## Checklist

- [ ] This request is focused on a specific improvement.
- [ ] I explained the use case, not only the desired implementation.
- [ ] I checked that a similar request is not already open.
